Event: Cashback 2025
Event Date: 01/12/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E61
Engraving 'Mark of Silence'

Enhancement: 1
When the unit is afflicted with silence, all negative effects are removed from them, and they become unable to be afflicted with silence for 2 / 3 / 4 sec. The unit also casts silence upon 2 random enemy units (preferred target: mage) for 2 / 3 / 4 sec. These enemy units are unable to use any abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) for 2 / 3 / 4 sec. The ability triggers once every 9 sec.

Enhancement: 2
11000 Magic armor from the gems
When the unit is afflicted with silence, all negative effects are removed from them, and they become unable to be afflicted with silence for 3 / 4 / 5 sec. The unit also casts silence upon 3 random enemy units (preferred target: mage) for 3 / 4 / 5 sec. These enemy units are unable to use any abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) for 3 / 4 / 5 sec. The ability's targets also receive pure damage equal to 11% / 12% / 13% / 14% / 15% / 17% / 20% of their maximum health. The ability triggers once every 9 sec.

Enhancement: 3
22000 Magic armor from the gems
When the unit is afflicted with silence, all negative effects are removed from them, and they become unable to be afflicted with silence for 4 / 5 / 6 sec. The unit also casts silence upon 4 random enemy units (preferred target: mage) for 4 / 5 / 6 sec. These enemy units are unable to use any abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) for 4 / 5 / 6 sec. Incoming damage against the ability's targets is also increased by 21% / 22% / 23% / 24% / 25% / 27% / 30% for 4 / 5 / 6 sec., and they receive pure damage equal to 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 20% / 22% / 25% of their maximum health. The ability triggers once every 9 sec.
